name: Iso11783PDDChangeDesignator
title: Iso11783PDDChangeDesignator
syntax: long Iso11783PDDChangeDesignator( dword ecuHandle, word objectID, char asciiDesignator[] );
description: The function sends a Change Designator message with a new object designator to the Task Controller.
The first variant converts the ASCII designator string to an UTF-8 string if the supported version is 2 or higher.
In the second variant you can specify if the designator string shall encoded to UTF-8 or not.
